rag_rules: Place input assumptions in component type annexes
Use boolean expressions for range comparisons
Avoid direct AADL property references in AGREE expressions
Use exact Boolean expressions only when the port is an AGREE bool in scope
generic_rules: Use named constants or visible relations for concrete bounds
Avoid opaque Boolean data range comparisons
Align helper declaration types with expression types
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks for AGREE contracts
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantees in implementation scope
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts
Do not convert Boolean domain values into integers
Do not encode AADL property names as AGREE variables
